---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like graphi to do. If it touches a surface (CLI, MCP, HTTP, TUI) or
an analyzer/parser, say which.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Local-first fit

graphi is local-first and zero-egress by design. Please confirm the request can
be satisfied without runtime network access (or explain why an opt-in exception
is warranted).
